nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Prescribes Perl coding style conventions for the ECC harness, covering language standards (strict/warnings), immutability practices, code formatting, and linting toolchain configuration.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Defines guidelines for using Claude Code PostToolUse hooks in Perl projects, including recommended hook patterns and warnings about common pitfalls.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Documents idiomatic Perl design patterns for the ECC context, including repository pattern, DTOs/value objects, resource management, module interfaces, and dependency management.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Specifies Perl security rules covering taint mode, input validation, safe file I/O, process execution hygiene, SQL injection prevention, and security scanning tooling.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Describes the Perl testing framework, test runner setup, coverage requirements, mocking strategies, and common pitfalls for the ECC harness Perl rule set.
